movie.actors: Steven Seagal, Eric Bogosian, Everett McGill, Katherine Heigl
movie.plot: Casey Ryback hops on a Colorado to LA train to start a vacation with his niece. Early into the trip, terrorists board the train and use it as a mobile HQ to hijack a top secret destructive US satellite.
movie.title: Under Siege 2: Dark Territory
movie.writer: Richard Hatem, Matt Reeves, J.F. Lawton (characters)
